ddls:
CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the donor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the donor */,
  "donor_type" TEXT /* Type of donor (e.g., individual, corporation) */,
  "donor_status" TEXT /* Status of the donor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "donation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of donations (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "last_donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last donation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code for the currency (e.g., EUR, USD) */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the currency (e.g., €, $) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base currency */,
  "target_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target currency */,
  "rate_date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data (e.g., Central Bank, Market) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_types" (
  "donation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation type */,
  "donation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the donation type (e.g., monetary, in-kind) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the donation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fundraising_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "goal_amount" REAL /* Goal amount for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "current_amount" REAL /* Current amount raised for the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "campaign_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fundraising_campaigns_campaign_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency of the donation */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate used for the donation */,
  "donation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation type */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fundraising campaign */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date the donation was received */,
  "converted_amount" REAL /* Converted amount in the organization's base currency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the donation */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the donation is anonymous */,
  "donation_status" TEXT /* Status of the donation (e.g., pending, completed, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_exchange_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("exchange_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES fundraising_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_donation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_type_id") REFERENCES donation_types ("donation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receipts" (
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receipt */,
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation */,
  "receipt_date" TEXT /* Date the receipt was issued */,
  "receipt_amount" REAL /* Amount of the receipt */,
  "receipt_number" TEXT /* Unique receipt number */,
  "is_electronic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the receipt is electronic */,
  "issued_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who issued the receipt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_issued_by FOREIGN KEY ("issued_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_donation_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_id") REFERENCES donations ("donation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thank_you_letters" (
  "letter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each letter */,
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation */,
  "letter_date" TEXT /* Date the letter was sent */,
  "letter_text" TEXT /* Text of the letter */,
  "letter_number" TEXT /* Unique letter number */,
  "is_electronic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the letter is electronic */,
  "issued_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who issued the letter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("letter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thank_you_letters_issued_by FOREIGN KEY ("issued_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thank_you_letters_donation_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_id") REFERENCES donations ("donation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fundraising staff, financial administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES fundraising_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is final or a draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_reports_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES fundraising_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_donors" (
  "campaign_donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign donor */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "donation_count" INTEGER /* Number of donations made by the donor for the campaign */,
  "total_donation_amount" REAL /* Total amount donated by the donor for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_donors_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_donors_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES fundraising_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text of the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_versions_donation_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_id") REFERENCES donations ("donation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., note, issue) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_comments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_comments_donation_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_id") REFERENCES donations ("donation_id")
)
